top_signals.title: Ukraine’s newest strike weapon drifts into Russia on the wind
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Russia are fielding the same balloons used by Ukraine that bait air defenses and now launch missiles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tech Losses Drag Global Stocks Lower; Oil Retreats: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Technology stocks once again pulled global indexes lower as renewed selling in semiconductor manufacturers and a possible delay to OpenAI’s public debut hit sentiment. Oil resumed its slide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Crude shipments through Hormuz at highest since Iran war began - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Crude shipments through Hormuz at highest since Iran war began  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Three ‘cybercrime as a service’ operations undercut by Microsoft, law enforcement
top_signals.summary: Microsoft touted its latest action against malware infrastructure as a new approach aimed at the full cybercrime "supply chain." Europol said more than 300 servers were targeted.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Resume Declines as AI Concerns Stall Tech Rally
top_signals.summary: US technology stocks were poised to drop, tracking sharp declines in Asian peers as investors remained skeptical about high artificial-intelligence valuations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apple stock gets slammed on bigger Mac, iPad price hikes. Why it can weather the storm
top_signals.summary: The stock had its worst session in more than a year as management made its first official move to pass higher memory costs onto consumers.
